title: Examining the relationship between climate concern, climate anxiety and climate action in the UK
authors: Emily Wolstenholme, Katharine Steentjes, Christina Demski, Wouter Poortinga

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: These are behavioral actions, not a carbon or fuel tax policy.

inclusion_reason: The paper studies climate concern/anxiety and general pro-environmental behaviors and activism, but does not analyze acceptability or support for any carbon or fuel tax.
exclusion_reason: No direct analysis of carbon tax, fuel tax, gasoline/diesel tax, or any equivalent tax instrument; only pro-environmental behavior and activism outcomes.
